title: nicotiana occidentalis subsp. hesperis
intro: Nicotiana occidentalis subsp. hesperis is a subspecies of the wildflower plant, commonly known as the western or California tobacco. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and congestion. The health benefits of Nicotiana occidentalis subsp. hesperis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve lung function, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma.
